title: The Super Soldiers
summary: The super-soldier community and training that runs through the archive's interviews and first-contact sessions.
markdown:
The **Super Soldiers** are a recurring subject in the archive, tied closely to the interviews
of [James Rink](/lore/james-rink/) and his community, and to the "super-soldier training"
Unimetrix 1 describes.

In the sessions Unimetrix 1 speaks of a network of individuals — some describing memories of
covert programs — and frames a path of **light-body and super-soldier training** as part of
its larger project of upgrading the human being toward the
[Rainbow Light Body](/lore/rainbow-light-body/). It describes this community as a "platform"
for people to rediscover purpose, connect with like minds, and develop body, emotion, mind,
and spirit, and it appears in the February 2024 "Super Soldier / Bashar
[First Contact](/lore/first-contact/)" session.

The theme bridges two sides of the archive: the testimony of those who come with super-soldier
memories, and Unimetrix 1's offer of a training path meant to transform them.
